title: Mischief’s big dream is to find a home
description: GEORGE NEWS - At the Garden Route SPCA...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - At the Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA), there’s a little dog with a big personality. His name is Mischief, and if you spend just five minutes with him, you’ll know exactly why.

Mischief is a four-year-old Jack Russell with a heart as big as his boundless energy. He’s the kind of dog who greets every new day with a wagging tail, ready for the next adventure.

Whether it’s chasing a leaf blown by the wind or performing zoomies in the yard, Mischief makes even the smallest moments exciting.


> But there’s one thing missing - his very own human.


Mischief sits up a little straighter whenever someone walks by, his warm brown eyes filled with hope.

“Is this my person?” he wonders. He dreams of long walks, belly rubs, and snuggling up next to a kind heart that will love him forever.

Mischief doesn’t ask for much—just a family to call his own. He promises to bring endless joy, laughter, and, of course, a little bit of mischief to your life.


> Are you the one he’s been waiting for?


Come meet Mischief at the Garden Route SPCA and let him steal your heart.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
